languages.text: {n}Почти бесшумно гвардейцы исчезают в зелени, занимая позиции для атаки. Вы вновь окидываете окружение взглядом, готовясь к финальному броску.{/n}
{n}Almost silently, the Guardsmen disappear into the foliage, taking up attack positions. You glance around again, preparing for the final push.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Почти бесшумно гвардейцы исчезают в зелени, занимая позиции для атаки. Вы вновь окидываете окружение взглядом, готовясь к финальному броску.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Almost silently, the Guardsmen disappear into the foliage, taking up attack positions. You glance around again, preparing for the final push.{/n}
{n}Almost silently, the Guardsmen disappear into the foliage, taking up attack positions. You glance around again, preparing for the final push.{/n}
{n}Almost silently, the Guardsmen disappear into the foliage, taking up attack positions. You glance around again, preparing for the final push.{/n}

languages.text: {n}警備隊員たちはほとんど音もなく、茂みの中に消えていく。攻撃位置を占める。あなたは再び周囲を見回し、最後の突撃に備える。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Almost silently, the Guardsmen disappear into the foliage, taking up attack positions. You glance around again, preparing for the final push.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}警備隊員たちはほとんど音もなく、茂みの中に消えていく。攻撃位置を占める。あなたは再び周囲を見回し、最後の突撃に備える。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Muhafızlar, neredeyse hiç ses çıkarmadan bitki örtüsünün arasında kaybolup saldırı pozisyonlarına geçiyor. Son taarruz için hazırlanırken etrafa bir kez daha göz atıyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Almost silently, the Guardsmen disappear into the foliage, taking up attack positions. You glance around again, preparing for the final push.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Muhafızlar, neredeyse hiç ses çıkarmadan bitki örtüsünün arasında kaybolup saldırı pozisyonlarına geçiyor. Son taarruz için hazırlanırken etrafa bir kez daha göz atıyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Casi sin hacer ruido, los guardias imperiales desaparecen entre el follaje para situarse en posiciones de ataque. Miras a tu alrededor una vez más, preparándote para la ofensiva final.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Almost silently, the Guardsmen disappear into the foliage, taking up attack positions. You glance around again, preparing for the final push.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Casi sin hacer ruido, los guardias imperiales desaparecen entre el follaje para situarse en posiciones de ataque. Miras a tu alrededor una vez más, preparándote para la ofensiva final.{/n}

languages.text: {n}卫兵们悄无声息地消失在植被丛中，摆出进攻态势。你再次环顾四周，准备发起最后的突击。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Almost silently, the Guardsmen disappear into the foliage, taking up attack positions. You glance around again, preparing for the final push.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}卫兵们悄无声息地消失在植被丛中，摆出进攻态势。你再次环顾四周，准备发起最后的突击。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dans un silence quasi complet, les gardes disparaissent dans le feuillage et se mettent en position d'attaque. Vous observez à nouveau les environs, vous préparant mentalement à l'assaut final.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Almost silently, the Guardsmen disappear into the foliage, taking up attack positions. You glance around again, preparing for the final push.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Dans un silence quasi complet, les gardes disparaissent dans le feuillage et se mettent en position d'attaque. Vous observez à nouveau les environs, vous préparant mentalement à l'assaut final.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nahezu lautlos verschwinden die Gardisten zwischen den Blättern und nehmen Angriffspositionen ein. Du lässt erneut deinen Blick schweifen, während du dich auf eine letzte Anstrengung vorbereitest.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Almost silently, the Guardsmen disappear into the foliage, taking up attack positions. You glance around again, preparing for the final push.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nahezu lautlos verschwinden die Gardisten zwischen den Blättern und nehmen Angriffspositionen ein. Du lässt erneut deinen Blick schweifen, während du dich auf eine letzte Anstrengung vorbereitest.{/n}
